name: Impossible Cherry-Custard Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 10-inch pie plate.
3. Drain the cherry filling, reserving the syrup.
4. Beat all ingredients except cherries and reserved syrup together in a blender on high for 15 seconds until smooth.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie plate.
6. Spoon the cherries evenly over the top.
7. Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, about 30-35 minutes.
8. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving with warm reserved syrup and sweetened whipped cream, if desired.
NOTE: The pie can be prepared up to 12 hours ahead of time and refrigerated. If refrigerating, increase baking time to 35-40 minutes.
